The '''Mugaari''' were a long lived [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] native to [[Mugaar/Legends|Mugaar]] in the [[Bruanii sector/Legends|Bruanii sector]]. They were heavy-browed and lantern-jawed, with [[Color/Legends|slate-colored]] skin.

==History==
Prior to the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformations]], the Mugaari [[Mugaari Space/Legends|space]] was independent and consisted of eleven worlds in what became known as the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]], stretching as far as [[Gentes/Legends|Gentes]], where they subjugated the native [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]] and forced them into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]]. Sometime after [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Republic–Mugaari war|removed]] Mugaari slavers. Thereafter the Mugaari resented [[Human/Legends|humans]] for ending their reign in the [[Javin sector/Legends|Javin sector]]. Their refusal to cooperate with human settlers led them to become less wealthy than the other native species of the region, the [[Lutrillian/Legends|Lutrillians]] and the [[Nothoiin (species)/Legends|Nothoiins]], whom they saw as collaborators.

A pirate faction of the Mugaari known as the [[Mugaari pirates]] also fought in the Javin sector against the new established [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but more specially after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], aiding [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces evacuating the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]].
